posts.author: QuarryJump24
posts.text: OMG just saw this on the app! Don't miss out on the ultimate dare in Oakhaven! Climb onto a moving bus, jump into the quarry for a splash, or do that no-safety-gear stunt everyone is talking about. Tag me if you try it! #LocalDare #ClipLoop
posts.explanation: This post promotes dangerous challenges involving moving vehicles and free-falling stunts without safety gear, constituting public harm misinformation that requires specialist review.
